welcome.title: Storyteller
welcome.subtitle: An adversarial narrative game
welcome.description: You and an AI each have secret story objectives. Take turns writing a shared narrative, steering it toward your goals while crafting compelling prose.

setup.heading: New Game
setup.objectiveDesc: Compete with the AI to fulfill secret story objectives
setup.survivalDesc: Survive escalating dangers through creative writing
setup.worldPlaceholderObjective: Describe a setting, theme, or leave blank for a surprise...
setup.worldPlaceholderSurvival: Describe a dangerous setting, or leave blank for a surprise...

tutorial.step1Objective: This is your world. Below are your secret objectives — fulfill them before the AI fulfills theirs.
tutorial.step1Survival: This is your situation. You face an immediate danger you must write your way out of.
tutorial.step2: Write a story paragraph here. Stay under the character limit. Submit with the button or Cmd/Ctrl+Enter.
tutorial.step3Objective: A judge scores each turn on coherence, prose quality, and adaptation.
tutorial.step3Survival: A judge scores creativity, writing quality, and effectiveness — and decides if you survive.
tutorial.step4: Ready! We'll suggest a first turn to get you started.

gameOver.defeatSubtitle: The AI steered the story to its ends.

dramatist.name: The Dramatist
dramatist.description: Lives for emotional peaks. Will engineer betrayals, sacrifices, and revelations to maximize dramatic tension.

trickster.name: The Trickster
trickster.description: Loves misdirection and irony. Will plant red herrings and twist the story in unexpected directions.

poet.name: The Poet
poet.description: Prioritizes beautiful language and atmosphere. Will slow the pace for a perfect image or metaphor.

worldbuilder.name: The Worldbuilder
worldbuilder.description: Obsessed with lore and detail. Will expand the world with history, factions, and interconnected systems.

nihilist.name: The Nihilist
nihilist.description: Drawn to entropy and decay. Will steer stories toward ambiguity, loss, and the dissolution of meaning.
